---
page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: false
  freeze: false
---

```{r}
library(yaml)
library(htmltools)

papers <- yaml::read_yaml("data/papers.yml")

esc <- function(x) htmltools::htmlEscape(as.character(x))

get_value <- function(x, name, default = "") {
  if (!is.null(x[[name]])) x[[name]] else default
}

slugify <- function(x) {
  x <- tolower(x)
  x <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "-", x)
  x <- gsub("^-|-$", "", x)
  x
}

make_home_tags <- function(categories, max_tags = 4) {
  if (length(categories) == 0) return("")
  categories <- head(categories, max_tags)
  paste0(
    vapply(
      categories,
      function(cat_name) {
        paste0(
          '<a class="tag" href="research.html#', slugify(cat_name), '">',
          esc(cat_name),
          '</a>'
        )
      },
      character(1)
    ),
    collapse = "\n"
  )
}

first_link <- function(links) {
  if (length(links) == 0) return(NULL)
  links[[1]]
}

make_recent_publication <- function(p) {
  id          <- get_value(p, "id", slugify(get_value(p, "title")))
  title       <- get_value(p, "title")
  authors     <- get_value(p, "authors")
  venue       <- get_value(p, "venue")
  year        <- get_value(p, "year")
  categories  <- get_value(p, "categories", list())
  links       <- get_value(p, "links", list())
  main_link   <- first_link(links)
  doi_link    <- if (!is.null(main_link)) {
    paste0('<a href="', esc(main_link$url), '">', esc(main_link$text), '</a>')
  } else {
    ""
  }

  paste0(
    '\n::: {.home-pub-card}\n',
    '### [', title, '](research.html#', id, ')\n\n',
    '<p class="pub-meta">', esc(authors), '. <em>', esc(venue), '</em>, ', esc(year), '.</p>\n\n',
    make_home_tags(categories), '\n\n',
    '<p class="pub-links"><a href="research.html#', id, '">Details</a>',
    ifelse(nchar(doi_link) > 0, paste0(' · ', doi_link), ''),
    '</p>\n',
    ':::\n'
  )
}

publications <- papers[vapply(
  papers,
  function(p) get_value(p, "status") == "publication",
  logical(1)
)]

publications <- publications[order(vapply(
  publications,
  function(p) -as.numeric(get_value(p, "year", 0)),
  numeric(1)
))]
```

# Mauricio Sarrias

::: {.home-hero}
::: {.home-hero-main}

**Associate Professor of Economics**  
Facultad de Economía y Negocios, Universidad de Talca, Chile

I am a regional scientist (pseudo economist) working on **spatial econometrics**, **discrete choice models**,  and **binary response models**. I develop econometric methods and R software for researchers working with spatial dependence, heterogeneous preferences, and limited dependent variables.

<div class="hero-buttons">
<a class="button button-primary" href="research.html">Research</a>
<a class="button button-secondary" href="files/cv/MS_cv_v11_en.pdf">Download CV</a>
</div>

:::

::: {.hero-photo}
![](files/img/ms.jpg)
:::

::: {.home-hero-side}

**Research areas**

<a class="tag" href="research.html#spatial-econometrics">Spatial econometrics</a>
<a class="tag" href="research.html#discrete-choice">Discrete choice</a>
<a class="tag" href="research.html#random-parameters">Random parameters</a>
<a class="tag" href="research.html#causal-inference">Causal inference</a>
<a class="tag" href="research.html#r-package">R packages</a>
<a class="tag" href="research.html#simulation">Simulation</a>

**Quick links**

- [My web of science](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/L-7627-2018)
- [My researchgate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Mauricio-Sarrias)
- [My google scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=7yqrotEAAAAJ&hl=es&oi=ao)
- [My scopus](https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=56490633500)
- [My github](https://github.com/mauricio1986)

:::
:::

## What I do

::: {.home-card-grid}

::: {.home-card}
### Research

I study econometric models for spatially dependent data, discrete choices, binary outcomes, endogenous regressors, and heterogeneous effects.

[See research](research.html)
:::

::: {.home-card}
### Software

I develop and maintain R tools for applied econometrics, including work related to multinomial logit models and spatial limited dependent variable models.

[See software](software.html)
:::

::: {.home-card}
### Teaching

I teach econometrics, causal inference, discrete choice models, and spatial econometrics at undergraduate, master, and doctoral levels.

[See teaching](teaching.html)
:::

:::

## Recent publications

```{r}
#| results: asis

for (p in head(publications, 4)) {
  cat(make_recent_publication(p))
}
```

<p class="more-link"><a href="research.html">View all research →</a></p>

## Selected software

::: {.home-card-grid}

::: {.home-card}
### gmnl

R package for multinomial logit models with observed and unobserved preference heterogeneity.

[Package and article](research.html#gmnl-the-multinomial-logit-model-with-random-parameters)
:::

::: {.home-card}
### spldv

R tools for spatial limited dependent variable models and related methods for applied spatial econometrics.

[Software and papers](research.html#r-package)
:::

:::
